case_title: MISSION DENTAL HEALTH VS TOBAR, KAROL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,125.00 FILED BY MISSION DENTAL HEALTH AS TO DEFENDANT TOBAR, KAROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOBAR, KAROL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-17-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-30-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCE, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOBAR, KAROL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-28-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-17-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR THE REMAINING BALANCE OF $666. IF NO APPEARNCES, CASE DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $100 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON 10/30/05 & ON THE
30TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
